tasks.title: [R11-5.B.1] Create .claude/skills/blueprint/** from templates/skills/blueprint/**
tasks.description:
Phase: Revision 11 — Skill-Based Agent Surface
Gate/Stream: Stream B — Local Skill Installation
Duration: 0.75
Dependencies: Gate

Detail:
Create .claude/skills/blueprint/** by copying the authoritative local payload from templates/skills/blueprint/**. The installed tree must include SKILL.md, all 20 reference/*.md module mirrors, reference/anti-patterns.md, and scripts/load-context.mjs.
tasks.author: Codex
tasks.implementation_notes: Copied templates/skills/blueprint into .claude/skills/blueprint. Verified the installed payload with tests/revision-11/phase-5/helpers.test.ts and tests/revision-11/stream-b/local-skill-install.test.ts, then ran node .claude/skills/blueprint/scripts/load-context.mjs from the repository root and confirmed the brief reports blueprint-cli, Revision 11, Phase 5 pending planning, and tracker presence at docs/.blueprint/tasks.db.

tasks.title: [R11-5.B.2] Add local-install mirror coverage for the installed .claude skill payload
tasks.description:
Phase: Revision 11 — Skill-Based Agent Surface
Gate/Stream: Stream B — Local Skill Installation
Duration: 0.75
Dependencies: R11-5.B.1

Detail:
Add local-install mirror coverage asserting .claude/skills/blueprint/** exists, contains exactly the expected 23-file payload, and is byte-identical to templates/skills/blueprint/**. The repo-root skills/blueprint/** mirror remains covered by Phase 4 tests; this phase adds the dogfood install location.
tasks.author: Codex
tasks.implementation_notes: Added shared local-install mirror helpers in tests/revision-11/phase-5/helpers.ts and contract coverage in tests/revision-11/stream-b/local-skill-install.test.ts. The new tests verify the 23-file .claude payload, byte identity with templates/skills/blueprint, and negative missing/drift/extra fixture cases.

tasks.title: [R11-5.B.3] Run and adjust the installed load-context.mjs against the local dogfood install
tasks.description:
Phase: Revision 11 — Skill-Based Agent Surface
Gate/Stream: Stream B — Local Skill Installation
Duration: 0.5
Dependencies: R11-5.B.1

Detail:
Run and, if needed, adjust node .claude/skills/blueprint/scripts/load-context.mjs so the installed skill can produce a current markdown context brief in this repository after the root entry points switch to skill mode.
tasks.author: Codex
tasks.implementation_notes: Ran node .claude/skills/blueprint/scripts/load-context.mjs from the repository root after installing the local skill payload. The brief printed blueprint-cli, Revision 11 — Skill-Based Agent Surface, Phase 5 pending planning, and tracker presence at docs/.blueprint/tasks.db with exit code 0; no script adjustment was needed.
